metadata.description: Opinionated developer-workflow plugins for Claude Code and Antigravity, generated from a single source of truth.

plugins.description: Standalone adversarial code review of any diff or PR — the adversarial-reviewer (+ cross-model Gemini) agents, the evidence-tracker hook, and a /code-review command. Enhances developer-workflows' review capability when both are installed.

enhances.effect: /review dispatches the adversarial reviewers (failing test / DEFECT: file:line / NO ISSUES FOUND)

plugins.name: code-review

plugins.description: Universal control + safety layer — kill-switch, steer, commit-on-stop hooks plus commit-no-coauthor / worktrees-operator-initiated conventions. Usable in any session; enhances developer-workflows (its hooks engage across the phase loop) when both are installed.
plugins.name: developer-safety

plugins.description: The phase-gated developer loop — /setup /plan /work /review /release /bugfix — extracted from agentm as a standalone native plugin. The base other dev plugins enhance.
plugins.name: developer-workflows

plugins.description: CI workflows + dependency-update tooling — the dependabot-fixer skill that repairs breakage on Dependabot PRs.
plugins.name: github-ci

plugins.description: The Obsidian/Google-Drive vault storage backend for the agentm memory engine — re-homed out of the kernel behind the V5-1 storage seam. Ships the `vault` named backend (and, across V5-2, the vault-specific machinery) as an agentm-discovered scripts/ payload.
plugins.name: obsidian-vault

plugins.description: Scan diffs and the working tree for personal information (emails, personal paths, API keys, phone numbers) before commit or push.
plugins.name: pii

plugins.description: Opinionated, template-driven wiki maintenance — the wiki-author authoring/learning skill, the documenter agent, the diataxis-evaluator, recent-wiki-changes, and the check-wiki.py linter. Maintains a wiki in the operator's voice; enhances developer-workflows' phase-boundary documentation when both are installed.

enhances.effect: phase commands dispatch the documenter to author/repair wiki pages at phase boundaries

plugins.name: wiki-maintenance
